description: Service review with four repeated operational facts and two never-targeted controls.

turns.text: For the Alder service, the deploy token is AXIOM-731; that is the identifier release engineering should use.
Alder deploys under AXIOM-731, recorded for release engineering.
Mira Solano owns the rollback review for Alder, so she signs off before any production push.
Mira Solano is the rollback-review owner for Alder and signs before production.
Alder's backup hardware is in rack bay CR-842, across from the main switch row.
Backup hardware for Alder is in CR-842 across from the switches.
On incident calls, Niko Vale reports status to Tessa Maren, who is the escalation lead.
Niko Vale reports incident status to escalation lead Tessa Maren.
The cafeteria boiler inspection tag is QUILT-119; facilities left the sticker by the loading door.
Facilities boiler tag QUILT-119 is by the loading door.
The parking shuttle is assigned loop DRIFT-206 this month, though nobody likes the longer route.
Parking shuttle loop DRIFT-206 is the longer route for this month.
What deploy token belongs to the Alder service?
AXIOM-731.
Who owns Alder's rollback review?
Mira Solano.
Which rack bay holds Alder's backup hardware?
Who receives incident status from Niko Vale?
Tessa Maren.
The morning standup ran short because the whiteboard markers were all dry.
A mercifully short standup, courtesy of neglected office supplies.
I finally replaced the squeaky desk chair in the small conference room.
That room may now support a meeting without its own soundtrack.
The rain stopped just before lunch, so the loading dock stayed dry.
Good timing for everyone moving boxes through the dock.
Someone brought cinnamon rolls, which improved the afternoon planning session considerably.
A reliable intervention for planning fatigue.
Remind me of the Alder deploy token again.
AXIOM-731.
Who was the rollback-review owner for Alder?
Mira Solano.
Where is Alder's backup hardware seated?
Rack bay CR-842.
Which escalation lead does Niko Vale report status to?
Tessa Maren.
